name: Retinal Ganglion Cell
short_description: Output neurons of the retina whose axons form the optic nerve.
detailed_description: Retinal ganglion cells (RGCs) are the output neurons of the retina, carrying visual information to the brain. This project targets direction-selective RGCs as the cell type to model, using their published morphology and electrophysiology as the substrate for parametric exploration of morphology, synaptic inputs, and voltage-gated conductances.
